slides.title: Meal prep a week in *one hour*.
slides.sub: You don't need 15 containers and a Sunday gone. Just a system that scales.

slides.title: Cook one big protein
slides.body: Roast a *tray of chicken or tofu* once. It anchors your lunches all week.

slides.title: One pot, done
slides.body: Make a big batch of *rice or potatoes* while the protein cooks. Zero extra effort.

slides.title: Roast a sheet pan
slides.body: One *sheet of vegetables* in the same oven. Mix and match them all week.

slides.title: Build different bowls
slides.body: Same three components, *different sauces* — so it never feels like leftovers.

slides.title: Prep, don't plate
slides.body: Store components separately and *assemble fresh*. Nothing goes soggy by Thursday.

slides.title: Eat well, *all week*.
slides.body: Snap each bowl and Vibe Health logs it in seconds — so a week of prep stays a week of tracking.
slides.tag: a week sorted in an hour

caption:
Meal prep doesn't mean 15 identical containers. It means one smart hour. ⏱️

Batch a protein, a carb and a sheet of veg, then remix with sauces all week. Save this for Sunday. 🔖

Snap each bowl and Vibe Health logs it in seconds → link in bio.
youtube_title: Meal Prep a Whole Week in One Hour
